title: Senior Software Engineer
description: EMPLOYEE ROLE Individual Contributor About the Role  We are seeking a highly motivated Senior Software Engineer to join the new Project Graph team at Adobe.  Project Graph is a new creative system that lets you combine first and third-party AI models, Adobe tools, and custom interactive components inside a visual, designer-friendly node graph editor. In this position, you will play a key role in designing and delivering developer-focused features of the Project Graph platform.
